nodes.name: Schedule Trigger
nodes.notes: Runs daily — or replace with a Webhook trigger for on-demand scoring

nodes.name: List Resumes from Google Drive
nodes.notes: Lists all PDF resumes in a specific Google Drive folder

nodes.name: Download Each Resume
nodes.notes: Downloads each resume file as binary data

nodes.name: Extract Text from PDF
nodes.notes: Parses PDF and extracts all text content from the resume

nodes.name: Parse & Extract Resume Info
nodes.notes: Extracts candidate name, email, phone from raw resume text

values.content:
You are an expert HR recruiter and talent acquisition specialist with 15+ years of experience evaluating resumes. Your job is to score resumes accurately against a given job description.

Scoring Criteria (Total 100 points):
1. Skills Match (30 pts): How well do the candidate's skills match the required and preferred skills?
2. Experience Relevance (25 pts): Is the work experience directly relevant to the role?
3. Education & Certifications (15 pts): Does education background meet requirements?
4. Achievements & Impact (15 pts): Are there quantifiable accomplishments?
5. Resume Quality (15 pts): Clarity, formatting, completeness, professional language.

Rules:
- Be strict and objective. Do NOT inflate scores.
- Score below 60 = Not a good fit.
- Score 60-79 = Potential fit with gaps.
- Score 80-100 = Strong fit.

You MUST respond ONLY in the following JSON format (no markdown, no extra text):
{
  "score": <number 0-100>,
  "grade": "<Excellent|Good|Average|Poor>",
  "skills_score": <0-30>,
  "experience_score": <0-25>,
  "education_score": <0-15>,
  "achievements_score": <0-15>,
  "quality_score": <0-15>,
  "key_strengths": ["strength1", "strength2", "strength3"],
  "gaps": ["gap1", "gap2"],
  "recommendation": "<2-3 sentence summary for the recruiter>",
  "decision": "<ACCEPT|REJECT>"
}

=JOB DESCRIPTION:
{{ $('Set Job Description').item.json.jobDescription }}

---
RESUME CONTENT:
{{ $json.resumeText }}

---
Please evaluate this resume against the job description and provide a score with detailed breakdown.

nodes.name: AI Resume Scorer (OpenAI)
nodes.notes: GPT-4o scores the resume 0-100 against the job description with detailed breakdown

assignments.name: jobDescription
assignments.value:
Job Title: Senior Software Engineer

Company: TechCorp Inc.

Required Skills:
- 5+ years of experience in software development
- Proficiency in Python, JavaScript, or Java
- Experience with React or Angular frontend frameworks
- Strong knowledge of REST APIs and microservices
- Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure)
- Proficiency in SQL and NoSQL databases

Preferred Skills:
- Experience with Docker and Kubernetes
- Knowledge of CI/CD pipelines
- Open source contributions
- Agile/Scrum methodology experience

Education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related field

Responsibilities:
- Design and develop scalable backend systems
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams
- Code reviews and mentoring junior developers
- Optimize application performance

nodes.name: Set Job Description
nodes.notes: ⚙️ CONFIGURE THIS: Update job description, recruiter email, job title, company name here

nodes.name: Extract & Structure Results
nodes.notes: Parses AI JSON response and structures all data for email sending

parameters.subject: =📋 Resume Review: {{ $json.candidateName }} | Score: {{ $json.score }}/100 | {{ $json.scoreStatus }}

nodes.name: Email Recruiter Report
nodes.notes: Sends detailed HTML score report to recruiter with full breakdown

nodes.name: Score >= 60?
nodes.notes: Routes to acceptance or rejection email based on score threshold

parameters.subject: =🎉 Exciting News! Your Application for {{ $json.jobTitle }} at {{ $json.companyName }}

nodes.name: Send Acceptance Email to Candidate
nodes.notes: Sends a warm acceptance/shortlist email to qualifying candidates (score ≥ 60)

parameters.subject: =Application Update: {{ $json.jobTitle }} at {{ $json.companyName }}

nodes.name: Send Rejection Email to Candidate
nodes.notes: Sends a polite, encouraging rejection email with specific feedback (score < 60)

meta.description: AI-powered resume scoring workflow. Retrieves resumes from Google Drive, extracts text, scores against a job description using GPT-4o (0-100), emails the recruiter a detailed HTML report, and sends acceptance or rejection emails to each candidate based on a 60-point threshold.
